# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for ELK stack (Elasticsearch, Logstash, Kibana). Define services for log collection, storage, and visualization. Configure Logstash pipelines for log parsing. Expose Kibana UI and Elasticsearch ports for access. This is for our centralized logging platform.
# Category: elasticsearch_logs_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  elasticsearch:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elasticsearch
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=elk-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - xpack.security.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled=false
      - xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled=false
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
      nofile:
        soft: 65536
        hard: 65536
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch-data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"
      - "9300:9300"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:9200/_cluster/health || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 60s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2g
        reservations:
          memory: 1g

  logstash:
    image: docker.elastic.co/logstash/logstash:8.12.0
    container_name: logstash
    environment:
      - "LS_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
      - xpack.monitoring.enabled=false
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline:ro
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml:ro
      - ./logstash/config/pipelines.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/pipelines.yml:ro
      - logstash-data:/usr/share/logstash/data
    ports:
      # Beats input (Filebeat, Metricbeat, etc.)
      - "5044:5044"
      # TCP/JSON input for generic log ingestion
      - "5000:5000/tcp"
      - "5000:5000/udp"
      # Syslog input
      - "5514:5514/tcp"
      - "5514:5514/udp"
      # HTTP input for webhook-style log submission
      - "8080:8080"
      # Logstash monitoring API
      - "9600:9600"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:9600/_node/stats || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 90s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
        reservations:
          memory: 512m

  kibana:
    image: docker.elastic.co/kibana/kibana:8.12.0
    container_name: kibana
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - SERVER_NAME=kibana
      - SERVER_HOST=0.0.0.0
      - XPACK_SECURITY_ENABLED=false
      - XPACK_ENCRYPTEDSAVEDOBJECTS_ENCRYPTIONKEY=a]V}|gN7LR9ClKFu4Km5~Re7b!6gty^&
      - TELEMETRY_ENABLED=false
      - LOGGING_ROOT_LEVEL=info
    volumes:
      - kibana-data:/usr/share/kibana/data
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "curl -f http://localhost:5601/api/status || exit 1"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 10
      start_period: 120s
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 1g
        reservations:
          memory: 512m

  # Optional: Filebeat for collecting Docker container logs
  filebeat:
    image: docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat:8.12.0
    container_name: filebeat
    user: root
    environment:
      - ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS=http://elasticsearch:9200
      - LOGSTASH_HOSTS=logstash:5044
    volumes:
      - ./filebeat/filebeat.yml:/usr/share/filebeat/filebeat.yml:ro
      - /var/lib/docker/containers:/var/lib/docker/containers:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
      - /var/log:/var/log:ro
      - filebeat-data:/usr/share/filebeat/data
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      logstash:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 256m
        reservations:
          memory: 128m

  # Optional: Curator for index lifecycle management
  curator:
    image: python:3.11-slim
    container_name: curator
    entrypoint: >
      /bin/sh -c "
        pip install elasticsearch-curator &&
        while true; do
          curator --config /etc/curator/curator.yml /etc/curator/actions.yml;
          sleep 86400;
        done
      "
    volumes:
      - ./curator/curator.yml:/etc/curator/curator.yml:ro
      - ./curator/actions.yml:/etc/curator/actions.yml:ro
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: unless-stopped
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 128m

  # Setup service: creates index templates and Kibana dashboards
  setup:
    image: docker.elastic.co/elasticsearch/elasticsearch:8.12.0
    container_name: elk-setup
    entrypoint: >
      /bin/sh -c "
        echo 'Waiting for Elasticsearch...';
        until curl -s http://elasticsearch:9200/_cluster/health | grep -q '\"status\":\"green\"\|\"status\":\"yellow\"'; do
          sleep 5;
        done;
        echo 'Elasticsearch is ready!';

        echo 'Creating index template for application logs...';
        curl -X PUT http://elasticsearch:9200/_index_template/app-logs-template \
          -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          -d '{
            \"index_patterns\": [\"app-logs-*\"],
            \"template\": {
              \"settings\": {
                \"number_of_shards\": 1,
                \"number_of_replicas\": 0,
                \"index.lifecycle.rollover_alias\": \"app-logs\"
              },
              \"mappings\": {
                \"properties\": {
                  \"@timestamp\": { \"type\": \"date\" },
                  \"message\": { \"type\": \"text\" },
                  \"log_level\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"service\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"host\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"source\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"trace_id\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"span_id\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" }
                }
              }
            }
          }';

        echo 'Creating index template for syslog...';
        curl -X PUT http://elasticsearch:9200/_index_template/syslog-template \
          -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          -d '{
            \"index_patterns\": [\"syslog-*\"],
            \"template\": {
              \"settings\": {
                \"number_of_shards\": 1,
                \"number_of_replicas\": 0
              },
              \"mappings\": {
                \"properties\": {
                  \"@timestamp\": { \"type\": \"date\" },
                  \"message\": { \"type\": \"text\" },
                  \"severity\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"facility\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"host\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" },
                  \"program\": { \"type\": \"keyword\" }
                }
              }
            }
          }';

        echo 'Creating ILM policy...';
        curl -X PUT http://elasticsearch:9200/_ilm/policy/logs-lifecycle \
          -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
          -d '{
            \"policy\": {
              \"phases\": {
                \"hot\": {
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"rollover\": {
                      \"max_age\": \"7d\",
                      \"max_size\": \"10gb\"
                    }
                  }
                },
                \"warm\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"7d\",
                  \"actions\": {
                    \"forcemerge\": { \"max_num_segments\": 1 },
                    \"shrink\": { \"number_of_shards\": 1 }
                  }
                },
                \"delete\": {
                  \"min_age\": \"30d\",
                  \"actions\": { \"delete\": {} }
                }
              }
            }
          }';

        echo 'Setup complete!';
      "
    networks:
      - elk-network
    depends_on:
      elasticsearch:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

volumes:
  elasticsearch-data:
    driver: local
    name: elk-elasticsearch-data
  logstash-data:
    driver: local
    name: elk-logstash-data
  kibana-data:
    driver: local
    name: elk-kibana-data
  filebeat-data:
    driver: local
    name: elk-filebeat-data

networks:
  elk-network:
    driver: bridge
    name: elk-network
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16

# ============================================================
# Supporting configuration files (create these in your project)
# ============================================================

# --- logstash/config/logstash.yml ---
# http.host: "0.0.0.0"
# xpack.monitoring.enabled: false
# pipeline.workers: 2
# pipeline.batch.size: 125
# pipeline.batch.delay: 50
# log.level: info
# path.data: /usr/share/logstash/data

# --- logstash/config/pipelines.yml ---
# - pipeline.id: beats-pipeline
#   path.config: "/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/01-beats-input.conf"
#   pipeline.workers: 2
#
# - pipeline.id: tcp-pipeline
#   path.config: "/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/02-tcp-input.conf"
#   pipeline.workers: 1
#
# - pipeline.id: syslog-pipeline
#   path.config: "/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/03-syslog-input.conf"
#   pipeline.workers: 1
#
# - pipeline.id: http-pipeline
#   path.config: "/usr/share/logstash/pipeline/04-http-input.conf"
#   pipeline.workers: 1

# --- logstash/pipeline/01-beats-input.conf ---
# input {
#   beats {
#     port => 5044
#     type => "beats"
#   }
# }
#
# filter {
#   if [type] == "beats" {
#     # Parse JSON logs from containers
#     if [message] =~ /^\{/ {
#       json {
#         source => "message"
#         target => "parsed"
#         skip_on_invalid_json => true
#       }
#       if [parsed][level] {
#         mutate { add_field => { "log_level" => "%{[parsed][level]}" } }
#       }
#       if [parsed][service] {
#         mutate { add_field => { "service" => "%{[parsed][service]}" } }
#       }
#       if [parsed][trace_id] {
#         mutate { add_field => { "trace_id" => "%{[parsed][trace_id]}" } }
#       }
#     }
#
#     # Parse common log formats (Apache/Nginx)
#     if [fileset][name] == "access" {
#       grok {
#         match => {
#           "message" => [
#             "%{IPORHOST:remote_ip} - %{DATA:user_name} \[%{HTTPDATE:access_time}\] \"%{WORD:http_method} %{DATA:url} HTTP/%{NUMBER:http_version}\" %{NUMBER:response_code} %{NUMBER:body_sent_bytes} \"%{DATA:referrer}\" \"%{DATA:user_agent}\"",
#             "%{COMBINEDAPACHELOG}"
#           ]
#         }
#         overwrite => ["message"]
#       }
#       date {
#         match => ["access_time", "dd/MMM/yyyy:HH:mm:ss Z"]
#         target => "@timestamp"
#       }
#       mutate {
#         convert => {
#           "response_code" => "integer"
#           "body_sent_bytes" => "integer"
#         }
#       }
#       useragent {
#         source => "user_agent"
#         target => "ua"
#       }
#       geoip {
#         source => "remote_ip"
#         target => "geoip"
#       }
#     }
#
#     # Parse application logs with timestamp and level
#     grok {
#       match => {
#         "message" => [
#           "%{TIMESTAMP_ISO8601:log_timestamp}\s+%{LOGLEVEL:log_level}\s+\[%{DATA:thread}\]\s+%{JAVACLASS:logger}\s+-\s+%{GREEDYDATA:log_message}",
#           "%{TIMESTAMP_ISO8601:log_timestamp}\s+%{LOGLEVEL:log_level}\s+%{GREEDYDATA:log_message}"
#         ]
#       }
#       overwrite => ["message"]
#       tag_on_failure => ["_grokparsefailure_app"]
#     }
#
#     # Parse stack traces (multiline)
#     if [message] =~ /Exception|Error|Traceback/ {
#       mutate { add_tag => ["exception"] }
#     }
#
#     # Normalize log levels
#     if [log_level] {
#       mutate {
#         uppercase => ["log_level"]
#       }
#       translate {
#         field => "log_level"
#         destination => "log_level_normalized"
#         dictionary => {
#           "TRACE" => "TRACE"
#           "DEBUG" => "DEBUG"
#           "INFO" => "INFO"
#           "WARN" => "WARN"
#           "WARNING" => "WARN"
#           "ERROR" => "ERROR"
#           "FATAL" => "FATAL"
#           "CRITICAL" => "FATAL"
#         }
#         fallback => "UNKNOWN"
#       }
#     }
#
#     # Remove unnecessary fields
#     mutate {
#       remove_field => ["agent", "ecs", "input", "log.offset"]
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# output {
#   if [type] == "beats" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       index => "app-logs-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       manage_template => false
#     }
#   }
# }

# --- logstash/pipeline/02-tcp-input.conf ---
# input {
#   tcp {
#     port => 5000
#     codec => json_lines
#     type => "tcp-json"
#   }
#   udp {
#     port => 5000
#     codec => json_lines
#     type => "udp-json"
#   }
# }
#
# filter {
#   if [type] in ["tcp-json", "udp-json"] {
#     # Add hostname if missing
#     if ![host] {
#       mutate { add_field => { "host" => "%{[@metadata][ip_address]}" } }
#     }
#
#     # Parse timestamp if present
#     if [timestamp] {
#       date {
#         match => ["timestamp", "ISO8601", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss", "yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss.SSSZ"]
#         target => "@timestamp"
#       }
#       mutate { remove_field => ["timestamp"] }
#     }
#
#     # Detect and parse JSON in message field
#     if [message] =~ /^\{/ {
#       json {
#         source => "message"
#         skip_on_invalid_json => true
#       }
#     }
#
#     mutate {
#       add_field => { "pipeline" => "tcp-json" }
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# output {
#   if [type] in ["tcp-json", "udp-json"] {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       index => "app-logs-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       manage_template => false
#     }
#   }
# }

# --- logstash/pipeline/03-syslog-input.conf ---
# input {
#   syslog {
#     port => 5514
#     type => "syslog"
#   }
# }
#
# filter {
#   if [type] == "syslog" {
#     grok {
#       match => {
#         "message" => [
#           "%{SYSLOGTIMESTAMP:syslog_timestamp} %{SYSLOGHOST:syslog_hostname} %{DATA:syslog_program}(?:\[%{POSINT:syslog_pid}\])?: %{GREEDYDATA:syslog_message}",
#           "%{SYSLOG5424LINE}"
#         ]
#       }
#       overwrite => ["message"]
#     }
#
#     date {
#       match => ["syslog_timestamp", "MMM  d HH:mm:ss", "MMM dd HH:mm:ss"]
#       target => "@timestamp"
#     }
#
#     # Map syslog severity
#     if [severity] {
#       translate {
#         field => "severity"
#         destination => "severity_label"
#         dictionary => {
#           "0" => "emergency"
#           "1" => "alert"
#           "2" => "critical"
#           "3" => "error"
#           "4" => "warning"
#           "5" => "notice"
#           "6" => "informational"
#           "7" => "debug"
#         }
#         fallback => "unknown"
#       }
#     }
#
#     # Map syslog facility
#     if [facility] {
#       translate {
#         field => "facility"
#         destination => "facility_label"
#         dictionary => {
#           "0" => "kernel"
#           "1" => "user-level"
#           "2" => "mail"
#           "3" => "daemon"
#           "4" => "auth"
#           "5" => "syslog"
#           "10" => "security"
#           "16" => "local0"
#           "17" => "local1"
#           "18" => "local2"
#           "19" => "local3"
#           "20" => "local4"
#           "21" => "local5"
#           "22" => "local6"
#           "23" => "local7"
#         }
#         fallback => "unknown"
#       }
#     }
#
#     mutate {
#       add_field => { "pipeline" => "syslog" }
#       rename => {
#         "syslog_hostname" => "host"
#         "syslog_program" => "program"
#         "syslog_message" => "message"
#       }
#       remove_field => ["syslog_timestamp", "syslog_pid"]
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# output {
#   if [type] == "syslog" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       index => "syslog-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       manage_template => false
#     }
#   }
# }

# --- logstash/pipeline/04-http-input.conf ---
# input {
#   http {
#     port => 8080
#     type => "http"
#     codec => json
#     response_headers => {
#       "Content-Type" => "application/json"
#       "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" => "*"
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# filter {
#   if [type] == "http" {
#     # Add received timestamp
#     ruby {
#       code => "event.set('received_at', Time.now.utc.iso8601(3))"
#     }
#
#     # Parse timestamp from payload
#     if [timestamp] {
#       date {
#         match => ["timestamp", "ISO8601", "yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss", "epoch"]
#         target => "@timestamp"
#       }
#       mutate { remove_field => ["timestamp"] }
#     }
#
#     # Remove HTTP metadata
#     mutate {
#       remove_field => ["headers", "host"]
#       add_field => { "pipeline" => "http" }
#     }
#   }
# }
#
# output {
#   if [type] == "http" {
#     elasticsearch {
#       hosts => ["http://elasticsearch:9200"]
#       index => "app-logs-%{+YYYY.MM.dd}"
#       manage_template => false
#     }
#   }
# }

# --- filebeat/filebeat.yml ---
# filebeat.inputs:
#   - type: container
#     paths:
#       - '/var/lib/docker/containers/*/*.log'
#     processors:
#       - add_docker_metadata:
#           host: "unix:///var/run/docker.sock"
#       - decode_json_fields:
#           fields: ["message"]
#           max_depth: 3
#           target: ""
#           overwrite_keys: true
#           add_error_key: true
#
#   - type: log
#     enabled: true
#     paths:
#       - /var/log/syslog
#       - /var/log/auth.log
#     fields:
#       log_type: syslog
#     fields_under_root: true
#
# output.logstash:
#   hosts: ["logstash:5044"]
#   bulk_max_size: 1024
#   loadbalance: true
#
# logging.level: info
# logging.to_files: true
# logging.files:
#   path: /usr/share/filebeat/data/logs
#   name: filebeat
#   keepfiles: 3
#   permissions: 0644

# --- curator/curator.yml ---
# client:
#   hosts:
#     - elasticsearch
#   port: 9200
#   url_prefix:
#   use_ssl: False
#   certificate:
#   client_cert:
#   client_key:
#   ssl_no_validate: False
#   timeout: 30
#   master_only: False
#
# logging:
#   loglevel: INFO
#   logfile:
#   logformat: default
#   blacklist: ['elasticsearch', 'urllib3']

# --- curator/actions.yml ---
# actions:
#   1:
#     action: delete_indices
#     description: "Delete indices older than 30 days"
#     options:
#       ignore_empty_list: True
#       disable_action: False
#     filters:
#       - filtertype: pattern
#         kind: prefix
#         value: app-logs-
#       - filtertype: age
#         source: name
#         direction: older
#         timestring: '%Y.%m.%d'
#         unit: days
#         unit_count: 30
#   2:
#     action: delete_indices
#     description: "Delete syslog indices older than 14 days"
#     options:
#       ignore_empty_list: True
#       disable_action: False
#     filters:
#       - filtertype: pattern
#         kind: prefix
#         value: syslog-
#       - filtertype: age
#         source: name
#         direction: older
#         timestring: '%Y.%m.%d'
#         unit: days
#         unit_count: 14
